results.issue_text: Using ElementTree to parse untrusted XML data is known to be vulnerable to XML attacks. Replace ElementTree with the equivalent defusedxml package, or make sure defusedxml.defuse_stdlib() is called.
Use of weak MD5 hash for security. Consider usedforsecurity=False
